satire_attempt: The Hustle-Sage Speaks: turns out you cannot delegate. Your cosmic dharma is the legacy billing system. The Gita commands you to remain on-call. Reject the email-to-VP — the universe assigned you the migration. Subscribe for more guidance from Ancient Wisdom For The Senior IC Who Cannot Say No.
verdict_reason: The satire requires the verse to bless any-and-all ownership — but the verse is explicit about its scope. The falsifiability paragraph names hoarding-and-refusing-to-delegate as the failure mode. The counter_example names the unjust-role case where Chapter 5 / 18.66 is the corrective. The implication explicitly carves out the case where the role has migrated. To make the satire stick, the verse would have to bless every assignment as binding; it does not. The hostile-engineer concern about manager-weaponisation is real but the verse pre-empts it. PASS.
